description_long: This is an ornate, antique-style armchair featuring a dark wooden frame with intricate carved detailing along the top rail and arm supports. The seat, backrest, and armrests are upholstered in a luxurious, patterned fabric with a gold and brown damask motif, giving it a regal and vintage appearance. The armrests are padded and upholstered, matching the seat and backrest, and are supported by robust, carved wooden structures. The legs are turned and carved, adding to the classic aesthetic and providing sturdy support. The backrest is high and rectangular, framed by decorative woodwork, and the overall build suggests comfort and durability. This armchair would be well-suited for placement in a formal urban setting such as a historic building lobby, upscale waiting area, or a park pavilion.
description: An ornate, antique-style armchair with dark carved wood and gold-brown damask upholstery, featuring padded armrests and a high, decorative backrest.
description_view_0: Front view showing the detailed carved wood frame, high backrest, and plush, patterned upholstery on the seat and armrests.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the seat cushion, the padded armrest, and the backward angle of the high backrest.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full back panel with the damask pattern and the decorative wooden crest at the top.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the armrest and the turned front leg details.
attribute_armrest_design: padded and upholstered with carved wooden supports
attribute_backrest_style: high, rectangular, with ornate carved wood crest and damask upholstery
